Package i5.cb.telos.frame

Class TelosParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.frame.TelosParser
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TelosParserConstants

    public class TelosParser
extends java.lang.Object
implements TelosParserConstants
    parses single or multiple Telos frames or parts of Telos frames. Usage:
    • First, construct a TelosParser object:
      TelosParser parser = new TelosParser( System.in );
    • Second, call the function that parses up to the nonterminal symbol you are expecting. E.g. to parse a list of Telos frames you would write:
      TelosFrames frames = parser.telosFrames();
    • If you want to go on parsing, just repeat calling the function corresponding to the appropiate nonterminal. For a list of all nonterminals, see the Telos grammar
